---
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
  title: Document title
---
###This is a test file for R

 
Text that I put here will be

```{r}

Object1 <- "1"

number1 <- as.numeric(Object1)
```
```{r}

### This code chunk is meant to make additional objects
Object2 <- "Myname"

Object3 <- "today's date"

print(Group1)
print(Object2,Object1)




```
 :) Hello World... Thank you so much for listening to this first lecture
